conjecture_title: Informal Conjecture on Universal N0 for Bumping a Ladder
summary: The conjecture asks whether the value of N in Theorem 2 (Bumping a ladder) can be taken as a universal constant N0 independent of k, possibly N0=4. The source paper (published in Combinatorica 2022) leaves this as an open question. A broad web search across arXiv and journal literature through May 2026 found no follow-up paper that resolves or makes partial progress on the universal-N0 question; the conjecture appears to remain open.
search_queries: arXiv 2002.00496 "excluding a ladder" Huynh Joret Micek Seweryn Wollan citing
Huynh Joret Micek Seweryn Wollan "ladder" minor 2023 2024 2025 arXiv graph conjecture
notes: No follow-up found after 5 web calls. The paper was published in Combinatorica 42 (2022) 405-432. Recent arXiv papers on related topics (e.g., arXiv:2501.11617 on excluding rectangular grid minors, arXiv:2508.04445 on 2-treedepth) were identified in search results but none appear to address the universal-N0 question directly. The conjecture is recent (source paper 2021) and the absence of any citing follow-up is consistent with it remaining open.
